subcodes.first_line: O thou liberated servant of God! Praise be to the Creator of the world, Who hath made thee privy to mysteries and intimate with humility and supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آزاده یزدان ستایش جهان آفرین را که ترا محرم راز کرد و عجز و نیاز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
